Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Tristania]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== Of Sea and Shadow ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 3''' — Tristania is wrapped in bandages.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 3''' — Tristania wears bandages over her eyes and keeps weapons in her coat.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 3''' — Tristania is known as the Silent One.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 3''' — Tristania is a member of the Guild of Witnesses.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 3''' — Tristania was self-taught in a Kanatalia laboratory.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 3''' — Tristania is traveling with Naberius.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 3''' — Tristania reached a hand inside her coat.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 5''' — Tristania is someone whose throat could be slit by assassins.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 5''' — Tristania uses a dark whip that produces pale light and lightning.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 5''' — Tristania is on the ship with Calder.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 11''' — Tristania is a character who was covering Naberius.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 11''' — Shera struck Tristania's back.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 12''' — Tristania uses an explosive whip to fight the Children of Nakothi.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 12''' — Tristania is a person being carried by Blackwatch members.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 12''' — Tristania has a high, clear, young, and weary voice.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 14''' — Tristania was shot in the back of the head by Naberius.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 16''' — Tristania is a person whom Naberius killed.}}

== Of Shadow and Sea ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 6''' — Tristania is a woman of roughly the same age as Naberius who was adopted by him.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 6''' — Tristania is a Chronicler and Naberius's partner.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 8''' — Tristania is sheathed head-to-toe in bandages and wears a brown coat.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 8''' — Tristania possesses a Soulbound Vessel in the form of a dark whip.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 8''' — Tristania is Soulbound to the Awakened tail of a Stormwing.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 11''' — Tristania's coat is invested to stop bullets.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 11''' — A giant beetle clambered up on Tristania.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 17''' — Tristania possesses a Stormwing tail Vessel.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
